title: artocarpus brevipedunculatus
intro: Artocarpus brevipedunculatus, commonly known as the Tualang tree, is a species of flowering plant in the mulberry family (Moraceae). The Tualang tree has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The extracts from the tree have been found to have various health benefits, such as antioxidant, anti-aging, and anti-cancer properties, as well as being used to treat wounds, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the Tualang tree is often used to make extracts, capsules, and tea infusions, which are sold in health food stores and online, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
